What is MoveMakers?

MoveMakers is a cross-functional global team where local and the Global team co-create and drive innovation in Talent Acquisition and Employer Branding.

We turn real challenges into practical solutions, together.

Our Principles
01
Practical over Theoretical
Real projects that create tangible impact from day one.
02
Transparency & Trust
Open communication and shared ownership.
03
Collaboration Mindset
Local knowledge meets global vision, no silos, just teamwork.
Why Join?
⚡
Real Impact
Your ideas shape global TA strategy, not just slide decks.
⚙
Learn by Doing
Hands-on projects that make a real difference.
◎
Purpose
Contribute to global initiatives with clear goals and real purpose.
◯
Global Network
Connect with peers across countries and build lasting relationships.
How It Works
1
Nomination & Selection
Countries nominate passionate colleagues to join the initiative.
2
Kick-off Session
Meet the team, align on goals, and define project scope together.
3
Project Sprints (~3 months)
2 × 30-min sessions/month. Build, test, iterate, and deliver.
4
Share & Scale
Present outcomes globally and see your work adopted across countries.
